input.command:
# Good! eth_call works. So the Relay list fallback SHOULD work.
# Let's check what the Relay currencies list returns for Base - how many tokens
curl -s -X POST "https://api.relay.link/currencies/v2" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"chainIds":[8453],"defaultList":true,"limit":200}' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
print(f'Total currencies: {len(d)}')
# Check for duplicates
addrs = [c['address'].lower() for c in d]
from collections import Counter
dups = {a:n for a,n in Counter(addrs).items() if n>1}
print(f'Duplicates: {len(dups)}')
# Show first 5
for c in d[:5]:
    print(c.get('symbol'), c.get('address')[:20], c.get('metadata',{}).get('isNative'))
"
input.description: Check Relay currencies list for Base
